title: Coding Theorems: Practical Error Correction
description: Learn the fundamental coding theorems that bridge theory and practice, including linear codes, the Gilbert-Varshamov bound, and capacity-approaching codes.
learningObjectives: Understand linear codes and their generator/parity-check matrices
Calculate the Hamming bound and Gilbert-Varshamov bound
Analyze the structure of capacity-approaching codes
Understand LDPC and Turbo code design principles
Connect classical coding to quantum error correction
Apply coding theory to practical communication systems
